item.title: The World’s Most Extreme Birds From Sun Chasers to Human Killers!
item.description:
Set your reminders for 5 PM! Join Nature Frontiers for a deep dive into the world’s most fascinating avian species. From birds that fly for years without landing to those capable of taking down a human, we are exploring the absolute extremes of the bird kingdom.
What we’re covering in today’s live stream:
The Southern Cassowary: Why this "modern-day dinosaur" is considered the world's most dangerous bird. The Arctic Tern: The incredible journey of the bird that "chases the sun" from pole to pole every year. The Common Swift: How this aerial master stays airborne for 10 months straight. The Owl: The secret physics behind the silent flight of the night's top predator. The Vulture: Nature’s essential (and misunderstood) cleanup crew. The Parrot: Exploring the surprising intelligence and social complexity of these colorful geniuses. We’ll be taking your questions live, so bring your best bird facts!
#NatureFrontiers #Birds #Wildlife #AnimalFacts #NatureDocumentary #LiveStream #Cassowary #ArcticTern
